query.description: Temporal visibility query. The SQL-like WHERE clause accepted by Temporal's ListWorkflow endpoint, e.g. "ExecutionStatus = 'Running'" or "WorkflowType = 'OrderWorkflow' AND CloseTime is null".

signal_name.description: Name of the workflow signal to deliver to every matched execution. The workflow code must define a handler with this name.

args.description: Argument to encode into the signal payload. Optional — omit for a signal with no argument. The Temporal Go SDK's default DataConverter (JSON over bytes) is used, so any JSON-encodable value is accepted.

limit.description: Maximum number of workflow executions the visibility query returns (single page). Mirrors the server-side PageSize parameter.

concurrency.description: Number of concurrent signal requests dispatched to the Temporal frontend. Capped at 100 to protect the frontend from overload.
